overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character running through a rainy, neon-lit Night City. The character crosses a major intersection, descends into a covered shopping arcade with bright advertisements, and emerges into a narrow alleyway.

events.description: character begins running across the yellow-striped crosswalk
dark sedan drives past on the right side of the frame

agents.ego_description: running across a wide yellow-striped crosswalk in the rain, heading toward the opposite sidewalk

notable_agents.action: dark sedan driving through the intersection on wet pavement
person in white tank top running alongside the ego character

entered.detail: massive vertical digital screen displaying a woman's face on the building facade
wide pedestrian crossing with bold yellow stripes reflecting in the rain
tall buildings with illuminated windows and neon accents

segments.scene_description: The character runs across a wide, rain-slicked intersection marked by bold yellow stripes. A massive digital billboard displaying a woman's face dominates the right side of the frame, while futuristic glass towers rise in the background. A dark sedan passes by on the right as pedestrians move through the scene.

events.description: turning right off the crosswalk onto the sidewalk
beginning descent down concrete stairs to lower level

agents.ego_description: turning onto the sidewalk, running past trees and approaching a staircase leading underground

notable_agents.action: shirtless man holding a glowing purple baton walking past the camera

entered.detail: wide staircase leading down to a covered pedestrian level
trees with green foliage lining the wet sidewalk
storefront entrance illuminated with purple neon lighting

segments.scene_description: The character turns right onto a wet concrete sidewalk lined with trees, moving away from the intersection. A shirtless man with a glowing purple baton passes by as the character approaches and begins descending a wide staircase. The large digital billboard disappears from view as the character moves deeper into the urban environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian shopping arcade with neon storefronts

events.description: entering covered walkway at bottom of stairs, sky no longer visible
passing by motionless person lying on the wet ground near the wall

agents.ego_description: running through the covered arcade past various shops and illuminated advertisements

notable_agents.action: person standing near a white planter box in the middle of the walkway

entered.detail: storefront with bright red neon signage reading GUN-O-MAT
large illuminated advertisement displaying COLA branding
pink neon sign for Brooklyn Diner restaurant
metal and glass ceiling structure covering the pedestrian area
row of illuminated orange seating along the right wall

segments.scene_description: The character enters a covered pedestrian arcade sheltered from the rain, with a ceiling of metal and glass overhead. Bright neon signs illuminate the space, including a red GUN-O-MAT sign, a Brooklyn Diner sign, and a large COLA billboard. The character runs past orange benches and vending machines while navigating the wet tiled floor.

scene_state.functional_zone: stairwell transitioning between lower and upper levels

events.description: beginning ascent up long flight of concrete stairs
approaching top of stairs, natural night lighting becoming visible

agents.ego_description: running up a long flight of concrete stairs back toward street level

entered.detail: long flight of concrete stairs ascending to upper street level
blue illuminated corporate signage reading BASKIN UNDERCOVER INC
backlit poster frame showing action movie artwork

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a long, enclosed concrete stairwell leading back to street level. Blue corporate signage for Baskin Undercover Inc is visible on the left wall, while a movie poster display illuminates the right. The covered arcade and its neon signs disappear from view as the character climbs toward the exit.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow urban alley with purple neon lighting

events.description: emerging from stairs into narrow alley with different lighting atmosphere
slight turn while navigating the narrow passage

agents.ego_description: running through a narrow wet alley illuminated by purple and yellow neon lights

notable_agents.action: woman in orange outfit standing with hands on hips near purple-lit entrance
person in red jacket walking away from camera down the alley

entered.detail: tall dark building facades creating a canyon-like effect
storefront bathed in vibrant purple light
illuminated green medical cross symbol on building facade

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the stairs into a narrow, wet alleyway with cobblestone pavement. The space is dominated by a purple neon-lit entrance on the left and a green pharmacy sign on the right. Tall building walls create an enclosed canyon effect as the character runs past pedestrians toward the distant alley exit.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a wide, rain-slicked city intersection into a sheltered neon arcade before emerging into a claustrophobic urban alleyway. It begins with the character sprinting across bold yellow stripes beneath a massive digital billboard and towering glass skyscrapers, before turning onto a wet sidewalk where the open skyline fades away. As the character descends a wide staircase, the scene shifts from the open rain into a covered pedestrian arcade illuminated by vibrant red and blue neon signs and glowing vending machines. The camera then follows the character up an enclosed concrete stairwell lined with corporate signage, leaving the bright arcade behind. Finally, the character emerges from the stairs into a narrow, cobblestone alleyway where tall building walls create a canyon effect beneath purple and green neon lights.
